---
title: "ES 667: Deep Learning"
subtitle: "IIT Gandhinagar · Aug 2026 · Prof. Nipun Batra"
---

[Course website](https://nipunbatra.github.io/dl-2026/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Syllabus &amp; reading map](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub repo](https://github.com/nipunbatra/dl-teaching){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

---

## Textbook backbone

The course follows **Prince · *Understanding Deep Learning*** (2023, free PDF).
Each lecture maps to one or more UDL chapters — see the tables below and the full [syllabus](syllabus.qmd).

| Role | Resource |
|------|----------|
| **Primary** — assigned reading | [Prince, *Understanding Deep Learning* (2023)](https://udlbook.github.io/udlbook/) — free PDF, CC-BY figures |
| **Supplement** — rigour &amp; curious reader | Bishop &amp; Bishop, *Deep Learning: Foundations and Concepts* (2024) |
| **Labs** — hands-on PyTorch | Zhang et al., [*Dive into Deep Learning*](https://d2l.ai) |
| **Video** — Transformer / LLM | Karpathy, *Neural Networks: Zero to Hero* |
| **Classic** — bibliography | Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville (2016) |

---

## Module 1 · Foundations &amp; Deep Networks (L1–L3)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 1 | Why Deep Learning + MLP Recap | Ch 1, 3 | [HTML](html/lec01-why-dl-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec01-why-dl-lecture.pdf) | |
| 2 | Universal Approximation &amp; Going Deep | Ch 4, 7, 11 | [HTML](html/lec02-uat-going-deep-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec02-uat-going-deep-lecture.pdf) | |
| 3 | Training Deep Networks in Practice | Ch 6, 8 | [HTML](html/lec03-training-in-practice-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec03-training-in-practice-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 2 · Optimization (L4–L5)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 4 | SGD, Momentum, Nesterov | Ch 6 | [HTML](html/lec04-sgd-momentum-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec04-sgd-momentum-lecture.pdf) | |
| 5 | Adam, AdamW, LR Schedules | Ch 6, 7 | [HTML](html/lec05-adam-schedules-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec05-adam-schedules-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 3 · Regularization (L6) — spans two sessions

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 6 | Regularization (classical + dropout + normalization) | Ch 9, 11 | [HTML](html/lec06-regularization-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec06-regularization-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 4 · CNNs &amp; Visual Recognition (L7–L9)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 7 | CNN Deep Dive + Classic Architectures | Ch 10 | [HTML](html/lec07-cnn-deep-dive-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec07-cnn-deep-dive-lecture.pdf) | |
| 8 | Modern Architectures &amp; Transfer Learning | Ch 10, 11 | [HTML](html/lec08-modern-cnns-transfer-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec08-modern-cnns-transfer-lecture.pdf) | |
| 9 | Object Detection, Localization &amp; Segmentation | Bishop Ch 10 | [HTML](html/lec09-detection-segmentation-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec09-detection-segmentation-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 5 · Sequence Models (L10–L11)

| # | Topic | Reading | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:-------:|:------:|:--------:|
| 10 | RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs | Bishop Ch 12 | [HTML](html/lec10-rnn-lstm-gru-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec10-rnn-lstm-gru-lecture.pdf) | |
| 11 | Seq2Seq &amp; Motivation for Attention | Bishop Ch 12 | [HTML](html/lec11-seq2seq-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec11-seq2seq-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 6 · Attention &amp; Transformers (L12–L14)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 12 | Attention Mechanism | Ch 12 | [HTML](html/lec12-attention-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec12-attention-lecture.pdf) | |
| 13 | The Transformer — Built Live | Ch 12 | [HTML](html/lec13-transformer-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec13-transformer-lecture.pdf) | |
| 14 | Tokenization &amp; Pretraining Paradigms | Ch 12 | [HTML](html/lec14-tokenization-pretraining-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec14-tokenization-pretraining-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 7 · LLMs (L15–L16)

| # | Topic | Reading | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:-------:|:------:|:--------:|
| 15 | Large Language Models | Chinchilla + HF course | [HTML](html/lec15-llms-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec15-llms-lecture.pdf) | |
| 16 | Alignment &amp; Fine-tuning | HF PEFT + DPO | [HTML](html/lec16-alignment-finetuning-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec16-alignment-finetuning-lecture.pdf) | |

## Module 8 · Self-Supervised &amp; Vision-Language (L17–L18)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 17 | Self-Supervised &amp; Contrastive Learning | Ch 14 | | |
| 18 | Vision-Language Models | Ch 12 + CLIP | | |

## Module 9 · Generative Models (L19–L22)

| # | Topic | UDL | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:---:|:------:|:--------:|
| 19 | Autoencoders &amp; VAEs | Ch 17 | | |
| 20 | GANs | Ch 15 | | |
| 21 | Diffusion Models — Theory | Ch 18 | | |
| 22 | Diffusion Models — Practice | Ch 18 + `diffusers` | | |

## Module 10 · Wrap-up (L23)

| # | Topic | Reading | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|------|:-------:|:------:|:--------:|
| 23 | Efficient Inference, Agents, Open Problems | Chip Huyen + HF inference | | |

---

## Code threads

- **Language** · micrograd (L3) → MLP (L3) → Transformer (L12–13) → nanoGPT (L13–14) → LoRA fine-tune (L16)
- **Vision** · MLP-MNIST (L1) → CNN-CIFAR (L7) → transfer-ResNet (L8) → ViT-CLIP (L18) → diffusion (L21–22)

## Canonical examples

Cat / not-cat · MNIST · CIFAR-10 · Tiny Shakespeare · CelebA
